quote: The world as we have created it is a process of our thinking.
author: Albert Einstein

quote: It is our choices, Harry, that show what we truly are, far more than our abilities.
author: J.K. Rowling

quote: There are only two ways to live your life. One is as though nothing is a miracle.
author: Albert Einstein

quote: The person who has not pleasure in a good novel must be intolerably stupid.
author: Jane Austen

quote: Imperfection is beauty, madness is genius and it is better to be absolutely ridiculous than boring.
author: Marilyn Monroe

quote: Try not to become a man of success. Rather become a man of value.
author: Albert Einstein

quote: It is better to be hated for what you are than to be loved for what you are not.
author: Andre Gide

quote: I have not failed. I have just found 10,000 ways that won't work.
author: Thomas A. Edison

quote: A woman is like a tea bag; you never know how strong it is until it is in hot water.
author: Eleanor Roosevelt

quote: A day without sunshine is like, you know, night.
author: Steve Martin
